MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-28-2021 IN 206, DEFENDANT SHAHROD SHOJA'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND RELATED DATES. WILLIAM CALLAHAM, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. LAURA LOPEZ, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT SHAHROD SHOJA VIA COURTCALL. STEFFANIE MALLA, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT SHAHROD SHOJA'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL OVER THE OPPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/29/21 IS CONTINUED TO 3/16/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL DISCOVERY IS CLOSED BY 10/29/21. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION WHICH IS IN VIOLATION OF SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THE COURT ORDERS ATTY. LOPEZ TO PAY $60.00 FILING FEE BY 4:00PM TODAY FOR THE CONTINUANCE WHICH IS THE COST FOR FILING PAPERS THAT DEFENDANT WOULD HAVE TO FILE AGAIN WITH A COURTESY COPY IN ORDER TO OBTAIN THE 3/16/22 TRIAL DATE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM. NOTICE IS WAIVED BY PARTIES. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
